subcodes.first_line: The blessed Cause is divine, yet from every direction calamities have encompassed it and all peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امر مبارک الهی است ولی از هر جهت آفات آنرا احاطه کرده است جمیع ملل
subcodes.subjects: @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution
